a:T6c90,<div class="question">
<p>The graphs show the variation of the displacement <em>y</em> of a medium with distance <span class="mjpage"><math alttext="x" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mi>x</mi>
</math></span> and with time <em>t</em> for a travelling wave.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: left;">What is the speed of the wave?</p>
<p style="text-align: left;"> </p>
<p style="text-align: left;">A.   0.6 m s<sup>–1</sup></p>
<p style="text-align: left;">B.   0.8 m s<sup>–1</sup></p>
<p style="text-align: left;">C.   600 m s<sup>–1</sup></p>
<p style="text-align: left;">D.   800 m s<sup>–1</sup></p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/1/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","1"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18N.1.SL.TZ0.15"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","1-1-measurements-in-physics"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>D</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n[N/A]\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
